seoTitle: Cambra vs Cambridge Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cambra and Cambridge Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cambra vs Cambridge Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambra and Cambridge Park.
heading: Cambra vs Cambridge Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambra, New South Wales and Cambridge Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cambra has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Cambridge Park (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambra or Cambridge Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambra has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Cambridge Park scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambra scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Cambridge Park scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambra or Cambridge Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cambra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
